title: [PrettifyVerilog] Don't sink expressions if their values might be changed in procedural regions

features.name: wire expression with concat replication using registers modified in always_comb
features.description: Code should include a wire continuous assignment with concatenation replication expression that uses registers also assigned with blocking assignments inside an always_comb block

features.name: always_comb with blocking assignments to registers used in wire expressions
features.description: Code should include an always_comb procedural block with blocking assignments to registers that are also used in expressions within wire continuous assignments

features.name: expression sinking on wire with procedural region side effects
features.description: Code should include a wire expression containing operations whose operands are modified by blocking assignments in a procedural region, triggering incorrect expression sinking optimization
